inputs.question: How many concerts are there in year 2014 or 2015?

inputs.question: Show the stadium name and the number of concerts in each stadium.

sql:
SELECT s.Name, COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS number_of_concerts
FROM stadium s
JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
GROUP BY s.Name

inputs.question: For each stadium, how many concerts play there?

sql:
SELECT s.Stadium_ID, COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count
FROM stadium s
LEFT JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID

inputs.question: Show the stadium name and capacity with most number of concerts in year 2014 or after.

sql:

FROM stadium s
JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
WHERE c.Year >= '2014'
GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Capacity
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Capacity
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

inputs.question: Find the name and location of the stadiums which some concerts happened in the years of both 2014 and 2015.

sql:

FROM stadium s
JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
WHERE c.Year = '2014'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM concert c2
    WHERE c2.Stadium_ID = s.Stadium_ID
    AND c2.Year = '2015'
)

WHERE c.Year = '2014'

    SELECT 1
    FROM concert c2
    WHERE c2.Stadium_ID = s.Stadium_ID
    AND c2.Year = '2015'
)

inputs.question: How many models does each car maker produce? List maker full name, id and the number.

sql:

FROM car_makers cm
JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
GROUP BY cm.Id, cm.FullName

inputs.question: Which model of the car has the minimum horsepower?

sql:
SELECT Model
FROM cars_data
JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId

LIMIT 1

LIMIT 1

inputs.question: Find the name of the makers that produced some cars in the year of 1970?

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cm.Maker
FROM car_makers cm
JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
JOIN car_names cn ON ml.Model = cn.Model AND ml.Maker = cn.MakeId
JOIN cars_data cd ON cn.MakeId = cd.Id
WHERE cd.Year = 1970

SELECT p.Paragraph_Text
FROM Paragraphs p
JOIN Documents d ON p.Document_ID = d.Document_ID
WHERE d.Document_Name = 'Customer reviews'

inputs.question: Show all document ids and the number of paragraphs in each document. Order by document id.

sql:
SELECT d.Document_ID, COUNT(p.Paragraph_ID) AS paragraph_count
FROM Documents d
LEFT JOIN Paragraphs p ON d.Document_ID = p.Document_ID
GROUP BY d.Document_ID
ORDER BY d.Document_ID

inputs.question: Return the different document ids along with the number of paragraphs corresponding to each, ordered by id.

sql:
SELECT d.Document_ID, COUNT(p.Paragraph_ID) AS paragraph_count
FROM Documents d
LEFT JOIN Paragraphs p ON d.Document_ID = p.Document_ID
GROUP BY d.Document_ID
ORDER BY d.Document_ID

inputs.question: Show all document ids, names and the number of paragraphs in each document.

sql:

FROM Documents d
LEFT JOIN Paragraphs p ON d.Document_ID = p.Document_ID
GROUP BY d.Document_ID, d.Document_Name

inputs.question: What are the ids and names of each document, as well as the number of paragraphs in each?

FROM Documents d
LEFT JOIN Paragraphs p ON d.Document_ID = p.Document_ID
GROUP BY d.Document_ID, d.Document_Name

inputs.question: Show the document id with paragraph text 'Brazil' and 'Ireland'.

sql:

FROM Documents d
JOIN Paragraphs p1 ON d.Document_ID = p1.Document_ID
JOIN Paragraphs p2 ON d.Document_ID = p2.Document_ID

inputs.question: What are the ids of documents that contain the paragraph text 'Brazil' and 'Ireland'?

sql:

FROM Documents d
JOIN Paragraphs p1 ON d.Document_ID = p1.Document_ID
JOIN Paragraphs p2 ON d.Document_ID = p2.Document_ID

  AND p2.Paragraph_Text LIKE '%Ireland%'

inputs.question: find the id, name and age for visitors who visited some museums more than once.

sql:

FROM visitor v
JOIN visit vi ON v.ID = vi.visitor_ID
GROUP BY v.ID, v.Name, v.Age
HAVING COUNT(vi.Museum_ID) > 1

GROUP BY v.ID, v.Name, v.Level_of_membership

LIMIT 1

inputs.question: What is the name of the visitor who visited both a museum opened before 2009 and a museum opened after 2011?

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT v.Name
FROM visitor v
JOIN visit v1 ON v.ID = v1.visitor_ID
JOIN museum m1 ON v1.Museum_ID = m1.Museum_ID
WHERE m1.Open_Year < '2009'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM visit v2
    JOIN museum m2 ON v2.Museum_ID = m2.Museum_ID
    WHERE v2.visitor_ID = v.ID
    AND m2.Open_Year > '2011'
)

inputs.question: Find the number of visitors who did not visit any museum opened after 2010.

sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM visitor 
WHERE ID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT v.visitor_ID 
    FROM visit v 
    JOIN museum m ON v.Museum_ID = m.Museum_ID 
    WHERE CAST(m.Open_Year AS INTEGER) > 2010
)

inputs.question: What are the death and injury situations caused by the ship with tonnage 't'?

sql:

FROM death d
JOIN ship s ON d.caused_by_ship_id = s.id

inputs.question: What are the different ids and names of the battles that lost any 'Brig' type shipes?

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.name
FROM battle b
JOIN ship s ON b.id = s.lost_in_battle
WHERE s.ship_type = 'Brig' AND b.result = 'loss'

inputs.question: What are the ids and names of the battles that led to more than 10 people killed in total.

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.name
FROM battle b
JOIN ship s ON b.id = s.lost_in_battle
JOIN death d ON s.id = d.caused_by_ship_id
GROUP BY b.id, b.name
HAVING SUM(d.killed) > 10

inputs.question: What is the ship id and name that caused most total injuries?

JOIN death d ON s.id = d.caused_by_ship_id
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY SUM(d.injured) DESC
LIMIT 1

inputs.question: Which student has enrolled for the most times in any program? List the id, first name, middle name, last name, the number of enrollments and student id.

sql:
SELECT 
    s.student_id,
    s.first_name,
    s.middle_name,
    s.last_name,
    COUNT(se.student_enrolment_id) AS enrollment_count
FROM 
    Students s
JOIN 
    Student_Enrolment se ON s.student_id = se.student_id
GROUP BY 
    s.student_id, s.first_name, s.middle_name, s.last_name
ORDER BY 
    enrollment_count DESC
LIMIT 1

inputs.question: What is the first, middle, and last name, along with the id and number of enrollments, for the student who enrolled the most in any program?

sql:
SELECT 
    s.first_name,
    s.middle_name,
    s.last_name,
    s.student_id,
    COUNT(se.student_enrolment_id) AS number_of_enrollments
FROM 
    Students s
JOIN 
    Student_Enrolment se ON s.student_id = se.student_id
GROUP BY 
    s.student_id, s.first_name, s.middle_name, s.last_name
ORDER BY 
    number_of_enrollments DESC
LIMIT 1

inputs.question: Whose permanent address is different from his or her current address? List his or her first name.

sql:
SELECT s.first_name
FROM Students s
JOIN Addresses a1 ON s.current_address_id = a1.address_id
JOIN Addresses a2 ON s.permanent_address_id = a2.address_id
WHERE a1.line_1 != a2.line_1
   OR a1.line_2 != a2.line_2
   OR a1.line_3 != a2.line_3
   OR a1.city != a2.city
   OR a1.zip_postcode != a2.zip_postcode
   OR a1.state_province_county != a2.state_province_county
   OR a1.country != a2.country
   OR a1.other_address_details != a2.other_address_details

inputs.question: How many times at most can a course enrollment result show in different transcripts? Also show the course enrollment id.

sql:
SELECT 
    sec.student_course_id,
    COUNT(tc.transcript_id) AS transcript_count
FROM 
    Student_Enrolment_Courses sec
JOIN 
    Transcript_Contents tc ON sec.student_course_id = tc.student_course_id
GROUP BY 
    sec.student_course_id
ORDER BY 
    transcript_count DESC
LIMIT 1

inputs.question: What is the maximum number of times that a course shows up in different transcripts and what is that course's enrollment id?

sql:
SELECT 
    c.course_id,
    COUNT(tc.transcript_id) AS max_transcript_count
FROM 
    Courses c
JOIN 
    Student_Enrolment_Courses sec ON c.course_id = sec.course_id
JOIN 
    Transcript_Contents tc ON sec.student_course_id = tc.student_course_id
GROUP BY 
    c.course_id
ORDER BY 
    max_transcript_count DESC
LIMIT 1

inputs.question: List the area codes in which voters voted both for the contestant 'Tabatha Gehling' and the contestant 'Kelly Clauss'.

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ac1.area_code
FROM AREA_CODE_STATE ac1
JOIN VOTES v1 ON ac1.state = v1.state
JOIN CONTESTANTS c1 ON v1.contestant_number = c1.contestant_number
JOIN AREA_CODE_STATE ac2 ON ac1.area_code = ac2.area_code
JOIN VOTES v2 ON ac2.state = v2.state
JOIN CONTESTANTS c2 ON v2.contestant_number = c2.contestant_number
WHERE c1.contestant_name = 'Tabatha Gehling'
  AND c2.contestant_name = 'Kelly Clauss'

inputs.question: What are all the possible breed type and size type combinations?

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.breed_name, s.size_description
FROM Dogs d
JOIN Breeds b ON d.breed_code = b.breed_code
JOIN Sizes s ON d.size_code = s.size_code

inputs.question: Find the distinct breed type and size type combinations for dogs.

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.breed_name, s.size_description
FROM Dogs d
JOIN Breeds b ON d.breed_code = b.breed_code
JOIN Sizes s ON d.size_code = s.size_code

inputs.question: List the first name of all the professionals along with the description of the treatment they have done.

sql:
SELECT p.first_name, tt.treatment_type_description
FROM Professionals p
JOIN Treatments t ON p.professional_id = t.professional_id
JOIN Treatment_Types tt ON t.treatment_type_code = tt.treatment_type_code

inputs.question: What are each professional's first name and description of the treatment they have performed?

sql:
SELECT p.first_name, tt.treatment_type_description
FROM Treatments t
JOIN Professionals p ON t.professional_id = p.professional_id
JOIN Treatment_Types tt ON t.treatment_type_code = tt.treatment_type_code

inputs.question: Show titles of songs and names of singers.

sql:
SELECT s.Title, si.Name
FROM song s
JOIN singer si ON s.Singer_ID = si.Singer_ID

inputs.question: What are the song titles and singer names?

sql:
SELECT s.Title, si.Name
FROM song s
JOIN singer si ON s.Singer_ID = si.Singer_ID

inputs.question: Show distinct names of singers that have songs with sales more than 300000.

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Name
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
WHERE so.Sales > 300000

inputs.question: what are the different names of the singers that have sales more than 300000?

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Name
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
WHERE so.Sales > 300000

inputs.question: Show the names of singers that have more than one song.

sql:
SELECT s.Name
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
GROUP BY s.Singer_ID, s.Name
HAVING COUNT(so.Song_ID) > 1

inputs.question: What are the names of the singers that have more than one songs?

sql:
SELECT s.Name
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
GROUP BY s.Singer_ID, s.Name
HAVING COUNT(so.Song_ID) > 1

inputs.question: Show the names of singers and the total sales of their songs.

sql:
SELECT s.Name, SUM(so.Sales) AS Total_Sales
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
GROUP BY s.Name

inputs.question: For each singer name, what is the total sales for their songs?

sql:
SELECT s.Name, SUM(so.Sales) AS Total_Sales
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
GROUP BY s.Name

inputs.question: List the name of singers that do not have any song.

sql:
SELECT Name
FROM singer
WHERE Singer_ID NOT IN (SELECT Singer_ID FROM song WHERE Singer_ID IS NOT NULL)

inputs.question: What is the sname of every sing that does not have any song?

sql:
SELECT s.Name
FROM singer s
LEFT JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
WHERE so.Singer_ID IS NULL

inputs.question: Show the citizenship shared by singers with birth year before 1945 and after 1955.

sql:
SELECT Citizenship
FROM singer
WHERE Birth_Year < 1945
INTERSECT
SELECT Citizenship
FROM singer
WHERE Birth_Year > 1955

inputs.question: What are the citizenships that are shared by singers with a birth year before 1945 and after 1955?

sql:
SELECT Citizenship
FROM singer
WHERE Birth_Year < 1945
INTERSECT
SELECT Citizenship
FROM singer
WHERE Birth_Year > 1955

inputs.question: How many available features are there in total?

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Other_Available_Features

inputs.question: What is the feature type name of feature AirCon?

sql:
SELECT ft.feature_type_name
FROM Ref_Feature_Types ft
JOIN Other_Available_Features oaf ON ft.feature_type_code = oaf.feature_type_code
WHERE oaf.feature_name = 'AirCon'

inputs.question: Show the property type descriptions of properties belonging to that code.

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT rt.property_type_description
FROM Properties p
JOIN Ref_Property_Types rt ON p.property_type_code = rt.property_type_code

inputs.question: What are the names of properties that are either houses or apartments with more than 1 room?

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.property_name
FROM Properties p
JOIN Ref_Property_Types r ON p.property_type_code = r.property_type_code
WHERE (r.property_type_description = 'House' OR r.property_type_description = 'Apartment')
  AND p.room_count > 1
